productDisplayName: Giordano Men Copper & Black Dial Watch
description: Each timepiece from giordano has an elegant, contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A watch designed for modern life but remaining true to its heritage. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 Year Copper coloured steel case for durability, style and comfort Brown leather strap with a tang clasp Copper and black dial with a date aperture at the 3 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Branding at the 12 hour mark Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rainWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
